steps.title: Locate the historians' claim
steps.content: The passage first says The Night Watch is often treated as Baroque. Then many art historians challenge the idea of a distinct Baroque era and claim the Baroque aesthetic was just an extension of Renaissance style.

steps.title: Choose the reality signal
steps.content: Choice B starts a sequence, but no list follows. Choice C signals similarity, though the historians oppose the earlier characterization. Choice D creates an unnecessary contrast inside the claim itself. The needed transition presents the historians' view as the actual state of affairs. The answer is A.
